H2600.strongs_def: gratis, i.e. devoid of cost, reason or advantage
H2600.kjv_def: without a cause (cost, wages), causeless, to cost nothing, free(-ly), innocent, for nothing (nought, in vain.

H2601.derivation: probably by orthographical variation for H2606 (חֲנַנְאֵל);

H2603.strongs_def: properly, to bend or stoop in kindness to an inferior; to favor, bestow; causatively to implore (i.e. move to favor by petition)
H2603.kjv_def: beseech, [idiom] fair, (be, find, shew) favour(-able), be (deal, give, grant (gracious(-ly), intreat, (be) merciful, have (shew) mercy (on, upon), have pity upon, pray, make supplication, [idiom] very.
H2603.usage: mercy(16x), gracious(13x), merciful(12x), supplication(10x), favour(7x), besought(4x), pity(4x), fair(1x), favourable(1x), favoured(1x)

H2605.strongs_def: Chanan, the name of seven Israelites

H2606.derivation: from H2603 (חָנַן) and H410 (אֵל); God has favored;
H2606.strongs_def: Chananel, probably an Israelite, from whom a tower of Jerusalem was named

H2607.strongs_def: Chanani, the name of six Israelites

H2608.derivation: or חֲנַנְיָהוּ; from H2603 (חָנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has favored;
H2608.strongs_def: Chananjah, the name of thirteen Israelites

H2610.strongs_def: to soil, especially in a moral sense

H2614.strongs_def: to be narrow; by implication, to throttle, or (reflex.) to choke oneself to death (by a rope)

H2616.strongs_def: properly, perhaps to bow (the neck only  in courtesy to an equal), i.e. to be kind; also (by euphemistically, but rarely) to reprove
H2616.kjv_def: shew self merciful, put to shame.

H2617.strongs_def: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
H2617.kjv_def: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.
H2617.usage: mercy(149x), kindness(40x), lovingkindness(30x), goodness(12x), kindly(5x), merciful(4x), favour(3x), good(1x), goodliness(1x), pity(1x), reproach(1x)

H2619.derivation: from H2617 (חֵסֵד) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has favored;

H2620.strongs_def: to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in

H2621.strongs_def: Chosah, an Israelite; also a place in Palestine
H2621.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H2623.kjv_def: godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly.

H2624.strongs_def: the kind (maternal) bird, i.e. a stork

H2627.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2637 (חָסֵר);

H2629.strongs_def: to muzzle; by analogy, to stop the nose

H2630.strongs_def: properly, to (be) compact; by implication, to hoard

H2635.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H2636 (חַסְפַּס);

H2636.derivation: reduplicated from an unused root meaning apparently to peel;

H2637.strongs_def: to lack; by implication, to fail, want, lessen
H2637.kjv_def: be abated, bereave, decrease, (cause to) fail, (have) lack, make lower, want.
H2637.usage: want(7x), lack(6x), fail(3x), decreased(1x), abated(1x), bereave(1x)

H2638.kjv_def: destitute, fail, lack, have need, void, want.
H2638.usage: void(6x), want(5x), lack(4x), fail(2x), destitute(1x), need(1x)

H2643.derivation: from H2653 (חׇפַף) (in the moral sense of covered from soil);

H2644.strongs_def: properly, to cover, i.e. (in a sinister sense) to act covertly

H2645.strongs_def: to cover; by implication, to veil, to encase, protect

H2648.strongs_def: properly, to start up suddenly, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, to fear

H2651.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain signification;

H2654.strongs_def: properly, to incline to; by implication (literally but rarely) to bend; figuratively, to be pleased with, desire
H2654.kjv_def: [idiom] any at all, (have, take) delight, desire, favour, like, move, be (well) pleased, have pleasure, will, would.
H2654.usage: delight(39x), please(14x), desire(9x), will(3x), pleasure(3x), favour(2x), like(2x), moveth(1x), would(1x)

H2655.kjv_def: delight in, desire, favour, please, have pleasure, whosoever would, willing, wish.

H2656.strongs_def: pleasure; hence (abstractly) desire; concretely, a valuable thing; hence (by extension) a matter (as something in mind)
H2656.kjv_def: acceptable, delight(-some), desire, things desired, matter, pleasant(-ure), purpose, willingly.
H2656.usage: pleasure(16x), desire(12x), delight(3x), purpose(3x), acceptable(1x), delightsome(1x), matter(1x), pleasant(1x), willingly(1x)

H2657.derivation: from H2656 (חֵפֶץ) with suffixes; my delight (is) in her;
H2657.strongs_def: Cheptsi-bah, a fanciful name for Palestine

H2658.strongs_def: properly, to pry into; by implication, to delve, to explore

H2659.derivation: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H2658 (חָפַר) through the idea of detection);
H2659.strongs_def: to blush; figuratively, to be ashamed, disappointed; causatively, to shame, reproach
H2659.kjv_def: be ashamed, be confounded, be brought to confusion (unto shame), come (be put to) shame, bring reproach.

H2660.derivation: from H2658 (חָפַר) or H2659 (חָפֵר); a pit of shame;
H2660.strongs_def: Chepher, a place in Palestine; also the name of three Israelites
H2660.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H2661.derivation: from H2658 (חָפַר); a hole; only in connection with H6512 (פֵּרָה), which ought rather to be joined as one word, thus חַפַרְפֵּרָה; by reduplication from H2658 (חָפַר);
H2661.strongs_def: a burrower, i.e. probably a rat

H2662.strongs_def: a Chephrite (collectively) or descendants of Chepher

H2664.strongs_def: to seek; causatively, to conceal oneself (i.e. let be sought), or mask
H2664.kjv_def: change, (make) diligent (search), disquise self, hide, search (for, out).

H2666.strongs_def: to spread loose; figuratively, to manumit

H2667.strongs_def: something spread loosely, i.e. a carpet

H2669.derivation: and חׇפְשִׁית; from H2666 (חָפַשׁ); (with H1004 (בַּיִת), a hospital)

H2671.derivation: from H2686 (חָצַץ); also by interchange for H6086 (עֵץ)
H2671.strongs_def: properly, a piercer, i.e. an arrow; by implication, a wound; figuratively, (of God) thunderbolt; the shaft of aspear
H2671.kjv_def: [phrase] archer, arrow, dart, shaft, staff, wound.

H2672.strongs_def: to cut or carve (wood, stone or other material); by implication, to hew, split, square, quarry, engrave
H2672.kjv_def: cut, dig, divide, grave, hew (out, -er), made, mason.
H2672.usage: dig(5x), hew(4x), hewers(4x), mason(3x), cut(1x), divideth(1x), graven(1x), hewn(1x), made(1x)

H2673.strongs_def: to cut or split in two; to halve
H2673.kjv_def: divide, [idiom] live out half, reach to the midst, participle

H2674.derivation: a collective form of H2691 (חָצֵר); village;
H2674.strongs_def: Chatsor, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine and of one in Arabia

H2675.derivation: from H2674 (חָצוֹר) and a Aramaizing form of the feminine of H2319 (חָדָשׁ) (compare H2323 (חֲדָת));
H2675.strongs_def: new Chatsor, a place in Palestine

H2676.derivation: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה;

H2677.derivation: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה;
H2677.kjv_def: half, middle, mid(-night), midst, part, two parts.

H2679.derivation: from H2677 (חֵצִי) and the plural of H4496 (מְנוּחָה), with the article interposed; midst of the resting-places;

H2680.strongs_def: a Chatsi-ham-Menachtite or descendant of Chatsi-ham-Menuchoth

H2682.derivation: perhaps originally the same as H2681 (חָצִיר), from the greenness of a courtyard;

H2683.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hold firmly;
H2683.strongs_def: the bosom (as comprised between the arms)

H2684.derivation: a collateral form of H2683 (חֵצֶן), and meaning the same

H2685.strongs_def: properly, to shear or cut close; figuratively, to be severe

H2686.derivation: a primitive root (compare H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה); also as denominative from H2671 (חֵץ)
H2686.strongs_def: properly, to chop into, pierce or sever; hence, to curtail, to distribute (into ranks);  to shoot an arrow
H2686.kjv_def: archer, [idiom] bands, cut off in the midst.

H2687.strongs_def: properly, something cutting; hence, gravel (as grit); an arrow

H2688.derivation: or חַצֲצֹן תָּמָר; from H2686 (חָצַץ) and H8558 (תָּמָר); division (i.e. perhaps row) of (the) palm-tree;

H2689.strongs_def: a trumpet (from its sundered or quavering note)

H2690.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to surround with a stockade, and thus separate from the open country; but used only in the reduplicated form חֲצֹצֵר; or (2 Chronicles 5:12) חֲצֹרֵר; as dem. from H2689 (חֲצֹצְרָה);
H2690.strongs_def: to trumpet, i.e. blow on that instrument

H2691.derivation: (masculine and feminine); from H2690 (חָצַר) in its original sense;
H2691.strongs_def: a yard (as inclosed by a fence); also a hamlet (as similarly surrounded with walls)

H2692.derivation: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and H146 (אַדָּר); (the) village of Addar;

H2693.derivation: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and a feminine of H1408 (גַּד); (the) village of (female) Fortune;

H2694.derivation: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and H8484 (תִּיכוֹן) with the article interposed; village of the middle;

H2695.derivation: by an orthographical variation for H2696 (חֶצְרוֹן); enclosure;

H2696.strongs_def: Chetsron, the name of a place in Palestine; also of two Israelites
H2696.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H2697.strongs_def: a Chetsronite or (collectively) descendants of Chetsron
